name: manage_objects
description: Add, update, or delete records in an Algolia index. Use batch operations to synchronize your data source with the search index efficiently. Each record must have a unique objectID. Supports partial updates to modify specific attributes without replacing the entire record.

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: The name of the index to modify.

parameters.name: requests
parameters.description: Array of batch operations. Each has an 'action' (addObject, updateObject, partialUpdateObject, deleteObject) and a 'body' containing the record data.
